title: 'You Can't Change the Wind, You Can Only Trim Your Sails': NITI Aayog VC Says India Can't Be 'Paralyzed' Amid West Asia Crisis
description: India must stay focused on its development goals and not allow external geopolitical shocks to derail its progress, NITI Aayog Vice Chairman Ashok Kumar Lahiri said on Thursday, using a sailing metaphor to underscore the country’s resolve amid the ongoing West Asia crisis.
